forecast-period.text: Clear. Light winds.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost on the eastern slopes. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Clear. Light winds.

Patches of morning frost in the north. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Clear. Patchy smoke haze in the west. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost south of Keith. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Light winds.
Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:40am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Clear. Light winds.

Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between minus 1 and 3 above zero with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. The chance of morning frost in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Areas of morning frost. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly on and east of the ranges. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly on and east of the ranges. Areas of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Hawker. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Sunny. Areas of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Light winds.
Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 1 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning frost. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Light winds.
Sunny. Areas of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Areas of frost and the chance of fog east of Coober Pedy in the morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning frost east of Coober Pedy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Sunny. Areas of frost and patchy fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. The chance of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.
